summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HR Dashboard (Vendor Hiring Dashboard). All core features working correctly. Fixed one backend bug in /api/analytics/roles endpoint. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All pages and interactions working.

fixed.issue: MongoDB aggregation pipeline error - $nin operator not valid inside $cond expression

issues: Shows 'null: 3' for candidates without vendor - minor data quality issue

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials
Home page KPI cards display correct values (Total Openings=10, Total Candidates=59, Interviews=12, Selected=0, Active=33, Shortlisted=18, Rejected=26)
Date filter quick buttons (7d, 14d, 30d, 90d, All) work and update KPIs
From/To date picker inputs visible and functional
Search bar on Home page filters recent candidates table
Google Sheets Sync button visible and clickable
Total Openings KPI card navigates to Job Openings tab
Other KPI cards (Total Candidates, Interviews, etc.) open same-page modal popups
Job Openings page shows 10 role cards with details
Job Opening card click opens detail modal
Analysis page shows conversion metrics (shortlist rate, interview rate, selection rate, offer rate, overall conversion)
Analysis page shows stage drop-off analysis section
Analysis page shows vendor performance table with shortlist% and selection%
Analysis page vendor row click opens detail modal
Contacts page loads with 29 contacts (vendors, HR SPOCs, interviewers, candidates)
Contacts page search filters contacts by name/vendor/email
Contacts page type filter buttons (All, HR SPOC, Vendor, Interviewer, Candidate) work
Contacts page clicking a contact opens detail modal
Interviews page loads (0 interviews - no interview slots in data)
Candidates page loads with 59 candidates
Candidates page filter dropdowns visible
Candidates page export button visible
Candidates page clicking a row opens detail sheet
Backend API /api/analytics/kpis-filtered works with date params
Backend API /api/contacts returns contact data with search param
Backend API /api/analytics/vendors returns vendor performance data
Backend API /api/analytics/pipeline returns stage distribution
Backend API /api/analytics/roles returns role data (after fix)
Backend API /api/candidates returns all candidates
Backend API /api/export/candidates returns Excel file
critical_code_review_comments: The /api/analytics/roles endpoint had invalid MongoDB aggregation syntax ($nin inside $cond) - FIXED
Interviews page shows 0 interviews because no candidates have interview_slot_l1 or interview_slot_l2 set in the data - this is expected based on current data
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing 59 candidates
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend has 13 passing tests. The /api/analytics/roles endpoint was fixed (MongoDB $nin syntax error). Interviews page shows 0 rows because no candidates have interview slots set in the data. Google Sheets sync may fail with 401 if sheets are not public (MOCKED behavior).

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: MongoDB aggregation pipeline used $nin operator inside $cond expression which is not valid. The correct syntax is $not: {$in: [...]}
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Endpoint now returns 200 with correct role data
